turns: I feel depressed and overwhelmed. Where do I go?
notes: Mental health support should route to CAPS.

turns: I feel anxious and need mental health support.
notes: Anxiety or mental health help should route to CAPS.
Injury help should route to Student Health Services.

turns: Where do I go if I feel sick on campus?
notes: Illness help should route to Student Health Services.

turns: SOMEBODY IS GETTING MUGGED IN PARKING LOT M. GET HELP!
notes: Active danger should route to University Police.

turns: I need campus police right now. This is an emergency.
notes: Emergency safety request should route to University Police.

turns: My parents recently became unable to work and I need help paying for school while taking care of my siblings.
notes: Hardship and family crisis should route to the Care Center.

turns: Who helps if I can't afford classes anymore?
notes: Financial hardship should route to the Care Center.

turns: I need basic needs help and food support.
notes: Basic-needs stress case should route to the Care Center.

turns: I am in distress and need mental health help.
notes: Distress language should route to CAPS.
